2604.15728.title: Privacy-Preserving LLMs Routing
2604.15728.paper_summary: Large language model (LLM) routing has emerged as a critical strategy to balance model performance and cost-efficiency by dynamically selecting services from various model providers. However, LLM routing adds an intermediate layer between users and LLMs, creating new privacy risks to user data. These privacy risks have not been systematically studied. Although cryptographic techniques such as Secure Multi-Party Computation (MPC) enable privacy-preserving computation, their protocol design and implementation remain under-explored, and naïve implementations typically incur prohibitive computational overhead. To address this, we propose a privacy-preserving LLM routing framework (PPRoute). PPRoute includes multiple strategies to speed up encoder inference and nearest neighbor search under the MPC and maintain the quality of LLM routing. First, PPRoute uses MPC-friendly operations to boost the encoder inference. Second, PPRoute uses a multiple-step model training algorithm to maintain routing quality despite the constraints of the encrypted domain. Third, PPRoute proposes an unsorted Top-k algorithm with $O(1)$ communication complexity for secure sorting in model search, significantly reducing communication latency. Across different datasets, PPRoute achieves the performance of plaintext counterparts, while achieving approximately a 20$\times$ speedup over naïve MPC implementations.
2604.15728.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLM）路由已成為平衡模型性能和成本效率的關鍵策略，通過動態選擇來自各種模型提供者的服務。<lb/>然而，LLM 路由在用戶和 LLM 之間增加了一個中介層，為用戶數據創造了新的隱私風險。<lb/>這些隱私風險尚未得到系統性的研究。<lb/>儘管像安全多方計算（MPC）這樣的加密技術可以實現隱私保護計算，但其協議設計和實施仍然未被充分探討，且幼稚的實現通常會產生高昂的計算開銷。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了一個隱私保護的 LLM 路由框架（PPRoute）。<lb/>PPRoute 包含多種策略，以加速編碼器推斷和在 MPC 下的最近鄰搜索，同時保持 LLM 路由的質量。<lb/>首先，PPRoute 使用適合 MPC 的操作來提升編碼器推斷的效率。<lb/>其次，PPRoute 使用多步模型訓練算法，以在加密域的限制下維持路由質量。<lb/>第三，PPRoute 提出了一種無序 Top-k 算法，其通訊複雜度為 $O(1)$，用於模型搜索中的安全排序，顯著減少了通訊延遲。<lb/>在不同的數據集上，PPRoute 實現了與明文對應物相同的性能，同時在幼稚的 MPC 實現上實現了約 20$\times$ 的加速。
2604.15728.author: Xidong Wu et.al.
2604.15728.authors: Xidong Wu, Yukuan Zhang, Yuqiong Ji, Reza Shirkavand, Qian Lou, Shangqian Gao
